intended_use_full: Neurophet AQUA is intended for Automatic labeling, visualization and volumetric quantification of segmentable brain structures from a set of MR images. Volumetric data may be compared to reference percentile data.
ground_truth: Expert manual segmentations verified and corrected by four radiologists; initial ground-truth generated using FreeSurfer v6.0
other_metrics: Dice coefficient for accuracy: subcortical brain structures 80-90%, cortical regions 75-85%. Mean percentage absolute volume differences for reproducibility: 1-5% for major subcortical structures.
